case_title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATON VS. ROCHEAN CHATMAN et al

calendar.matters:
UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Off Calendar

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: J. Rumsey; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Caritas Management Corporation is present. Represented by Hugo Sandoval.
Attorney, John Zanghi is appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Rochean Chatman is present and appearing with Limited Scope attorney, Mehran Fardis.

The Judge Pro Tem Ann Hipshman, litigants and counsel meet and confer in Dept. 502B, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.

The trial date of October 09, 2012 is vacated.
